version_description: Classic 80's pop-rock feel. Please follow the record for how these changes go by. Watch for the key change up a half step for the first chorus and from the second chorus through the outro. Ends on a strum of G#m7 that fades as it slides back down the neck.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
N.C.
[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch]
[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb/C[/ch]      [ch]F/C[/ch]
 Meeting you with a view to a kill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb/C[/ch]             [ch]F/C[/ch]   
 Face to face in secret places, feel the chill[/tab]


[Interlude 1]
[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]             [ch]F/A[/ch]
Nightfall covers me,  but you know the plans I'm making[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]            [ch]F/A[/ch]         [ch]Fsus2[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
Still over-see,  could it be the whole Earth opening wide[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]Bsus2[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]Dbsus2[/ch]
A sacred why, a mystery gaping[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]Dbsus2[/ch] [ch]Db7sus4[/ch]
In-side,    the weekend's why,   un -  til we[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Dance into the fire, that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch] 
Dance into the fire, two fatal sounds of broken dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Dance into the fire, that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch] 
Dance into the fire[/tab]


[Interlude 2]
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D#[/ch]  
[ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]F#sus2[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb/C[/ch]      [ch]F/C[/ch]
 The choice for you is the view to a kill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb/C[/ch]            [ch]F/C[/ch]   
 Between the shades assassi-nation standing still[/tab]


[Interlude 3]
[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]              [ch]F/A[/ch]
Earth's crystal tears, the fall of snowflakes on your body[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]               [ch]F/A[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
First time in years to drench your skin in lover's rosy  stain[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Bsus2[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]Dbsus2[/ch]
A chance to find the phoenix for the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]Dbsus2[/ch] [ch]Db7sus4[/ch]
Flame,     a chance to die,  but    can we[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Dance into the fire, that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch] 
Dance into the fire, two fatal sounds of broken dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Dance into the fire, that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Eadd2[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch] 
Dance into the fire[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]     [ch]D#m7[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Eadd2[/ch]
When all we see,  is the view to a kill[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd2[/ch]
[ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd2[/ch]
[ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Eadd2[/ch]
[ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]
